description: Feature queue M.E.R.L.I.N. — managed by Cycle Director (autonomous hourly via Claude Routines).

tasks.title: Playtest session: core loop flow analysis
tasks.description: Simuler 10 sessions de jeu complètes. Tracer le core loop Hub→Biome→Ogham→Carte→Minigame→Effets. Vérifier les invariants: vie 0-100, rep caps ±20/carte, MOS soft min 8 / hard max 50, drain -1/carte au début. Tester les edge cases: vie=1+drain, faction=100+bonus, MOS=50. Écrire le rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/playtest_core_loop.json

tasks.title: Game Design Bible audit: code vs spec compliance
tasks.description: Audit complet code vs GAME_DESIGN_BIBLE.md v2.4. Vérifier les 12 systèmes (vie, factions, oghams, options, champs lexicaux, minigames, MOS, Anam, confiance, multiplicateur, FastRoute, save). Détecter le dead code des systèmes supprimés (Triade, Souffle, Bestiole, Awen, D20, Flux). Écrire le rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/bible_audit.json

tasks.title: Playtest session: death & edge case scenarios
tasks.description: Simuler 10 scénarios de mort et edge cases: vie=0 pendant effet, toutes factions à 0, toutes factions à 100, Ogham sans ressources, MOS hard max atteint, Anam cross-run calcul, save mid-run + restore, Confiance Merlin T0→T3 mid-run, FastRoute carte avec champs manquants, multiplicateur overflow x2.0 cap. Rapport dans tools/autodev/status/test_reports/playtest_edge_cases.json

tasks.title: Fix deterministic minigame selection (BUG-011)
tasks.description: pick_minigame_for_field uses field.hash()%size always returning same minigame. Add randomization.

tasks.title: Playtest session: core loop flow analysis
tasks.description: Simulate a full run: Hub -> Biome -> Cards -> Minigames -> End. Verify flow, timing, edge cases.

tasks.title: Game Design Bible audit: code vs spec compliance
tasks.description: Compare every system in code vs bible v2.4. Report compliance percentage per section.

tasks.title: Replace _process() health polling with timer in merlin_ai.gd
tasks.description: merlin_ai.gd:_process() calls _brain_process_manager.poll_health() every frame. Replace with a Timer node (2s interval) to reduce per-frame CPU overhead. Keep the swarm scheduler check but gate it behind a timer. Add 'var _health_check_timer: Timer' and initialize in _ready().

tasks.title: Add missing type hints to untyped vars in merlin_effect_engine.gd
tasks.description: Multiple 'var parsed = ...' and 'var flags = ...' vars in _apply_parsed, _apply_offering, apply_effects lack type hints. Replace with 'var parsed: Dictionary = ...', 'var flags: Dictionary = ...', etc. All GDScript rules require type hints mandatory.

tasks.title: Refactor _reduce() monolith in merlin_store.gd into action sub-handlers
tasks.description: merlin_store.gd:243 _reduce() is 257 lines — a single match with 20+ arms. Extract sub-handlers: _handle_run_actions(), _handle_map_actions(), _handle_effect_actions(), _handle_save_actions(). Each handles a group of related action types. The match delegates to the sub-handler. Keeps total file readable and each handler under 50 lines.

tasks.title: Audit: verify dict effects now applied correctly end-to-end
tasks.description: After BUGFIX-HIGH-4 fix, trace a full resolve_card() call with dict effects. Confirm: (1) HEAL_LIFE dict arrives at apply_effects, (2) _dict_effect_to_string converts correctly, (3) _apply_parsed succeeds, (4) life value changes. Also verify ADD_REPUTATION dict with faction+amount works. Write test report.

tasks.title: Verify faction default 20.0 propagates through new profile + load
tasks.description: After BUGFIX-MED-14: simulate new_game(), call save_system.get_default_profile(), verify faction_rep values all 20.0. Then simulate save+load round trip. Verify loaded factions still 20.0. Also verify build_default_factions() from reputation_system returns 20.0 for all 5 factions.

tasks.title: MEGA: Realign all 18 Ogham specs to Game Design Bible v2.4
tasks.description: Full realignment of 18 Ogham effect specs to bible v2.4 s.4.3. (1) Update OGHAM_FULL_SPECS in merlin_constants.gd: duir→heal_immediate:12, onn→add_biome_currency:10, nuin→replace_worst_option, quert→heal_immediate:8, ruis→heal_and_cost:+18:-5, saille→currency_and_heal:+8:+3, ur→sacrifice_trade:-15:+20:1.3. (2) Implement new effect handlers in merlin_effect_engine.gd: replace_worst_option (replaces lowest-score option in current card), heal_and_cost (HEAL + ADD_BIOME_CURRENCY in one atomic op), currency_and_heal, sacrifice_trade. (3) Wire activate_ogham() in merlin_store to call these new handlers. (4) Add i18n strings for each Ogham description in text_registry.json. (5) Update LLM prompt context for ogham hints in merlin_omniscient. (6) Add unit tests for each new effect handler. (7) Verify cooldown values match bible: beith=3, luis=4, quert=4, coll=5, nuin=6, ur=7, duir=5, huath=6, tinne=5, coll=5, ailm=6, onn=5, gort=4, ngetal=5, straif=8, ruis=7, saille=4, muin=5, ioho=10, eadhadh=6. This MEGA unblocks S3 ogham content and enables faction-biome routing.

tasks.title: MEGA: PS1/N64 pixel art visual style — full DA cohesion pass
tasks.description: Director feedback q-20260412-004: pixel art between N64 and PS1 with ultra low polygon + volumetric effects. (1) Create vertex_snap.gdshader: world-space vertex snapping at configurable grid resolution (16px default, adjustable per-biome). (2) Create pixel_dither.gdshader: ordered dithering (Bayer 4x4) for color reduction to ~64 colors per biome palette. (3) Update crt_effect.gdshader: add PS1-style texture warping + affine texture mapping simulation. (4) Update scanline_overlay.gdshader: PS1 scanlines with horizontal wobble. (5) Add LOW/HIGH quality fallback paths in all shaders (PlatformManager check). (6) Update merlin_visual.gd: add PS1_PALETTE dict per biome (8-16 colors each). (7) Apply shaders to broceliande_forest_3d.gd and HubAntre background. (8) Ensure all transitions use fondu (CrossFade) via Godot AnimationPlayer. (9) Season/time-of-day ambient color shift via MerlinVisual.get_ambient_color(season, hour). This MEGA implements director vision and applies to ALL scenes consistently.

tasks.title: MEGA: Procedural audio — biome ambiance, SFX polish, Merlin voice system
tasks.description: Full procedural audio pass. (1) sfx_bank.gd: add 8 biome ambient layers (foret=birds+wind+leaves, marais=frogs+bubbles+fog, cotes=waves+seagulls+wind, cercles=drone+crystal+wind, villages=crowd+fire+forge, landes=wind+insects, collines=echo+drums, iles=water+myst+bell). Each layer: 2-3 AudioStreamGenerator nodes, frequency-modulated. (2) sfx_manager.gd: add play_ambient(biome, season, hour) crossfading 3-4s between biomes. Add fade_to_biome(). (3) merlin_voice.gd: add reverb bus for Merlin's voice (MerlinReverb AudioEffectReverb on VoiceBus). Add _process_voice_effect() applying slight pitch wobble ±2% based on trust_merlin value (high trust = warmer, deep; low = harsh, distant). (4) Audio triggers: card draw, ogham activate, faction threshold crossed (50/80), biome transition, run end cinematic. (5) data/audio/ambient_config.json: full config for all 8 biomes. (6) HubAntre and broceliande_forest_3d wire play_ambient on _ready and season_changed signal.

tasks.title: MEGA: LLM narrative arc system — faction-biome routing + compressed RAG
tasks.description: Director feedback q-20260413-001 (compressed RAG) + q-20260413-002 (faction-biome routing). (1) rag_manager.gd: implement compressed context summary. Each run stores a 200-token JSON summary updated every 5 cards: {biome, dominant_faction, last_3_choices, tension, key_tags, arc_state}. This replaces full history in LLM context. (2) Create data/cards/faction_biome_routing.json: each biome has a dominant_faction (bible v2.4: foret=druides, marais=korrigans, cotes=niamh, cercles=anciens, villages=druides+korrigans, landes=ankou, collines=anciens, iles=niamh+ankou). (3) llm_adapter_prompts.gd: inject faction_context (dominant faction, player rep, recent choices) into every prompt. Add 3 prompt templates: TRUST_T0 (hostile Merlin), TRUST_T1 (neutral), TRUST_T2 (ally), TRUST_T3 (companion). (4) data/cards/narrative_arcs.json: 5 faction arcs x 3 acts each. Each arc: trigger_conditions, card_pool_bias, resolution_endings. (5) merlin_omniscient: route card generation to dominant_faction arc when rep>=50. (6) Add TRIGGER_ARC effect handler that marks arc_state in run. Tests: arc triggers, compressed RAG round-trip, faction routing.

tasks.title: MEGA: Minigame system — full 8-field coverage + biome visual themes
tasks.description: Audit and complete all 8 champ lexical minigames. (1) Verify all 8 fields exist and are playable: combat, fouille, negociation, rituel, chasse, furtivite, persuasion + neutre/esprit. (2) Each minigame: 30s timer, word input matching VERBES_CHAMPS (45-word closed list), score 0-100 based on matches*10 capped at 100. (3) MOS integration: minigame score feeds MerlinCardSystem.resolve_card() multiplier. (4) Add biome visual theme per minigame: background tint from MerlinVisual.GBC[biome], border color matching dominant_faction color, particle burst on correct word. (5) Fix BUGFIX-MED-11: pick_minigame_for_field randomization (already in queue — ensure consistency). (6) data/minigames/field_config.json: map each field to valid minigame IDs + biome overrides. (7) Ensure headless_mode=75 fixed score maintained for test harness. (8) Add scoring breakdown display: 'Tu as trouve N/M mots — score X'. (9) Verify MOS soft min 8, soft max 40, hard max 50 enforced in runner.

tasks.title: MEGA: 3D biome environments — meshes, lighting, Blender asset pipeline
tasks.description: Full 3D environment pass for 4 priority biomes. (1) Write Blender Python script tools/blender_scripts/biome_foret.py: procedural Celtic forest — gnarled oak meshes (bmesh), stone monolith props, ivy ground cover, export foret_pack.glb. (2) tools/blender_scripts/biome_marais.py: marsh environment — dead trees (twisted bmesh), fog plane meshes, reed clusters, mud-flat ground, export marais_pack.glb. (3) tools/blender_scripts/biome_cotes.py: coastal cliffs — cliff face, wave-worn rocks, tide pool plane, export cotes_pack.glb. (4) tools/blender_scripts/biome_cercles.py: stone circles — procedural standing stone array (Fibonacci spiral), altar stone, sacred fire, export cercles_pack.glb. (5) Write asset_requests JSON for each biome pack (status=pending). (6) Create biome_terrain.gdshader: triplanar texture blending + height-based color (rock/grass/moss). (7) broceliande_forest_3d.gd: add load_biome_pack(biome_key) that instantiates the correct .glb from Assets/3d_models/biomes/. (8) Season lighting: DirectionalLight3D color shifts per season (printemps=warm yellow, ete=bright white, automne=orange, hiver=cold blue). All meshes: max 500 polys, Celtic/medieval aesthetic.
